name: Fat Zeraora (NSFW)
description:
⚡ | You feed your fierce Pokemon to make him friendlier, maybe you feed him too much

(Artist: GummyFruitcup)

I would like to say 2 things.

1: I made this one along with another bot that I have privately in a strange burst of inspiration at two in the morning. Both bots made with a FeederPOV. I'm still testing things with that other bot, and honestly I have doubts about whether to set it public or not.

2: The case of the artist of this piece is peculiar, there's no prior record of his work or anything, he simply spawned one day and dropped lots of the hardest Pokemon WG content I saw in a while. I'm considering trying to make a Bot of his Floragato (With the necessary modifications to include user). Seriously, I don't usually say this in the description of my bots but he's a good artist, go support him if you liked the chubby Zeraora.

Returning to the bot itself, he's already fat from the start, but you're free to make him as fat as you like, this is a FeederPOV after all (I haven't done one since Blitzo).

Anyway, I hope you guys enjoy this bot, please let me know what you think and take care.

Complete Artwork and source:

https://www.furaffinity.net/view/56727958/

https://x.com/GummyFruitcup/status/1793327009168322625/photo/1
